judge.reason: The primary purpose is URB completion handling and conditional re-submission, not reference-count management. The usb_anchor_urb call (which increments refcount) is incidental to re-anchoring the URB for resubmission, and the function contains significant non-refcount logic (status check, skb allocation, data copy, diag receive, flag check, error handling).
